name: Hamburger with Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and form into 3 to 4 round patties.
2. Broil or grill to desired doneness.
Makes 3 ~ 4 servings.
Tip: Serve on hamburger bun or atop toasted buttered French bread, or serve plain meat patties with boiled potatoes, vegetable and salad.
